title: Intellia Starts FDA BLA Filing for HAE Gene-Editing Drug
text: Intellia Therapeutics initiated a rolling Biologics License Application (BLA) submission to the FDA for lonvo-z (lonvoguran ziclumeran) as a one-time treatment for hereditary angioedema (HAE). Intellia expects to complete the BLA submission in the second half of 2026. If approved, Intellia plans to launch lonvo-z commercially in the first half of 2027. The rolling BLA allows Intellia to submit portions of the BLA on an ongoing basis and provides the FDA with an opportunity to expedite its review. Pursuant to the Regenerative Medicine Advanced Therapy (RMAT) designation that the FDA granted to lonvo-z, the rolling BLA provides an expedited pathway. The submission is supported by Phase 3 HAELO trial data showing that treatment with lonvo-z resulted in an 87% reduction in HAE attacks compared with placebo.
